metadata.description: Copilot CLI extensions and plugins for more visible, controllable agent workflows.

plugins.name: copilot-cost
plugins.description: Show Copilot CLI message, conversation, session, context, cache, and rolling usage metrics.
plugins.postInstallMessage:
Plugin installed successfully.
You can set up the extension by opening a fresh Copilot session, ensure experimental mode is on, then run `/copilot-cost:ext-cost-setup`.
All-in-one command: 'copilot --experimental -i "/copilot-cost:ext-cost-setup"'.
